data.title: Naples Soap cleans up ecommerce operations, strategy
data.description: The company has now refocused on its own online storefront to better control brand experience and margins.

data.title: Provi and Southern Glazer’s provisionally settle an antitrust lawsuit
data.description: “The parties have reached an agreement in principle to resolve the litigation,” said a spokesperson for Southern Glazer’s.

data.title: Amazon pilots 'Buy for Me' AI shopping tool
data.description: Buy for Me uses agentic AI to allow shoppers to buy products from other brand websites directly within the Amazon Shopping app.

data.title: Internal memo: Shopify CEO declares AI ‘non-optional’
data.description: The memo marks a new chapter in Shopify’s evolution, positioning AI not as a support tool, but as a core capability.

data.title: 10 ecommerce trends that are reshaping online retail in 2025
data.description: As online retailers deal with tariffs, technology disruptions and more in 2025, these ecommerce trends define shifts that are already taking place.
